# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers direct, straightforward communication without verbose markdown explanations or obvious details. Use a more casual, efficient tone - skip the extra guidance files and keep instructions concise. Focus on getting the job done without over-explaining.
- Skip creating implementation reference documents, technical deep-dive guides, and detailed technical reference files. User considers these a waste of tokens. Focus on making the actual code changes and keep documentation minimal - only create essential user-facing summaries if absolutely needed.
